title: Narayana Health Digital is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Narayana Health Digital is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
